description_long: This is a rustic wooden handcart with a rectangular open cargo area constructed from horizontal slats, supported by two large spoked wooden wheels on either side. The cart features long, straight wooden handles extending from the front, designed for manual pulling or pushing. The sides and rear of the cargo area are enclosed by wooden rails, providing containment for transported items. The wheels are attached with visible metal axles, adding structural stability and mobility. The wood appears dark-stained, giving the cart a traditional, vintage appearance suitable for parks, gardens, or historical urban settings. The overall build suggests it is sturdy and functional for carrying moderate loads over short distances.
description: A vintage-style wooden handcart with slatted sides, large spoked wheels, and long front handles for manual transport. The cart is dark-stained and features side rails for securing cargo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the slatted wooden front, the two large wheels, and the open cargo area behind the front rails.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long handles, spoked wheel, and the full length of the slatted cargo platform with side rails.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open cargo area, both wheels, and the slatted construction of the platform and rails.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other wheel, the length of the handles, and the side rails enclosing the cargo area.
